objective: Fix Price Matrix extraction to use hybrid pipeline (Cheerio noise reduction → Ollama structured extraction) and test on all stored HTML files.
completed_this_session: Price Matrix: 566 junk entries → 12 clean entries (0 junk, 0 empty, 0 missing price, 0 missing duration)
Added postTitle parameter to runTextExtraction() so implicit product names are resolved from ad title (e.g., '가족계정' → 'YouTube Premium 가족계정')
Added filterCrossPairedArtifacts() to remove LLM cross-pairing errors between product tiers
Added field-label junk detection: /가[\s]?격|이용\s?기간|기\s?간|할인|쿠폰/ catches HTML parser mis-pairing labels with prices
Added completenessScore() to priority logic: LLM wins when it has high completeness even with fewer products than HTML
Full pipeline test on 33 unique HTML files: 97.0% success rate, 32/33 via llm-text, 1/33 via html
All 5 curated test vendors pass consistently
Re-extracted SQLite DB with clean data for Price Matrix UI

full_pipeline_results.known_flaky_file: eb67ebba985c (기프티콩~) — LLM non-determinism on this complex ad sometimes produces 2 clean products, sometimes 4 with 1 missing price. Acceptable with 7b model.
